classes.label: Manufacturing Facility
classes.description: A manufacturing facility is a physical environment where manufacturing processes take place.

classes.label: Sensor
classes.description: A sensor is a device, agent, or software component that performs observations.

classes.label: Logistic Process
classes.description: A logistic process is a process related to the movement, storage, or management of materials or products.

classes.label: Manufacturing Process
classes.description: A manufacturing process is an industrial process carried out within a manufacturing facility to produce or transform products.

classes.label: Action
classes.description: An action is an operation or intervention performed in response to a detected situation in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Workstation
classes.description: A workstation is a physical area in the manufacturing environment where one or more machines or resources are organized to perform a specific task.

classes.label: Staff
classes.description: Staff is a human agent involved in the operation or supervision of manufacturing processes.

classes.label: Constraint
classes.description: A constraint is a condition or rule that restricts or defines acceptable states of a process, resource, or situation.

classes.label: Operator
classes.description: An operator is a worker responsible for operating machines or performing production tasks.

classes.label: Situation S4
classes.description: Situation S4 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Feature of Interest
classes.description: A feature of interest is the entity whose property is being observed.

classes.label: Situation S5
classes.description: Situation S5 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Instant
classes.description: An instant is a specific point in time.

classes.label: Situation S14
classes.description: Situation S14 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Situation S3
classes.description: Situation S3 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Situation S6
classes.description: Situation S6 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Resource
classes.description: A resource is an entity used during manufacturing processes, such as a machine, material, or human resource.

classes.label: Cause
classes.description: A cause is a factor or event responsible for the occurrence of a situation in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Human Process
classes.description: A human process is a process primarily performed by human operators within the manufacturing environment.

classes.label: Machine
classes.description: A machine is a device used to perform a manufacturing task, either autonomously or with human intervention.

classes.label: Feature
classes.description: A feature is a spatial entity representing a physical object or location in the manufacturing environment.

classes.label: Manager
classes.description: A manager is a person responsible for supervising manufacturing operations and responding to detected situations.

classes.label: Situation S2
classes.description: Situation S2 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Interval
classes.description: An interval is a temporal extent with a beginning and an end.

classes.label: Geometry
classes.description: A geometry is the geometric representation of a spatial feature.

classes.label: Spatial Object
classes.description: A spatial object is an entity with a spatial extent in the manufacturing environment.

classes.label: Product
classes.description: A product is an item produced or processed during manufacturing operations.

classes.label: Result
classes.description: A result is the outcome or value produced by an observation.

classes.label: Platform
classes.description: A platform is an entity that hosts sensors, actuators, samplers, or other platforms.

classes.label: Situation S1
classes.description: Situation S1 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Situation S13
classes.description: Situation S13 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Production Line
classes.description: A production line is a group of manufacturing cells arranged to carry out a sequence of production tasks.

classes.label: Situation S11
classes.description: Situation S11 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Situation S9
classes.description: Situation S9 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Property
classes.description: A property is a characteristic of an entity that can be observed or measured.

classes.label: Situation S10
classes.description: Situation S10 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Situation S8
classes.description: Situation S8 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Observable Property
classes.description: An observable property is a property of a feature of interest that can be observed by a sensor.

classes.label: Situation S7
classes.description: Situation S7 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Temporal Entity
classes.description: A temporal entity is a temporal interval or instant used to represent the time of an observation or situation.

classes.label: Situation
classes.description: A situation is a contextual state describing conditions in a manufacturing environment based on observations, processes, and contextual factors.

classes.label: Situation S12
classes.description: Situation S12 is a specialized situation class representing a specific contextual state in the manufacturing system.

classes.label: Technician
classes.description: A technician is a technical specialist responsible for maintaining or repairing equipment.

classes.label: Process
classes.description: A process is an activity that transforms inputs into outputs.

classes.label: Manufacturing Cell
classes.description: A manufacturing cell is a group of workstations organized to perform a particular manufacturing task.

classes.label: Observation
classes.description: An observation is an event in which a sensor measures or estimates the value of an observable property of a feature of interest.

classes.label: Part
classes.description: A part is a component or piece used in the assembly or production of a product.

classes.label: COInd Context Ontology for Industrial Situations
classes.description: Ontology describing contextual situations in industrial environments, integrating sensor observations (SOSA/SSN), spatial context (GeoSPARQL), and temporal relations (OWL-Time).

properties.label: interval before
properties.description: Relates a time interval that occurs completely before another interval.

properties.label: interval overlaps
properties.description: Relates an interval that overlaps another interval without either interval containing the other.

properties.label: has time
properties.description: Relates an observation to the temporal entity that represents when it occurred.

properties.label: performs process
properties.description: Relates a resource to a process that it performs or supports.

properties.label: tangential proper part inverse
properties.description: Relates a spatial region that contains another region and touches its boundary.

properties.label: has beginning
properties.description: Relates a temporal interval to the instant that marks its beginning.

properties.label: interval contains
properties.description: Relates a time interval that fully contains another interval.

properties.label: made observation
properties.description: Relates a sensor to an observation that it made.

properties.label: has observation
properties.description: Relates a situation to an observation associated with it.

properties.label: defined on
properties.description: Relates a situation or property to the entity or context element on which it is defined.

properties.label: is in situation
properties.description: Relates an observation to the situation with which it is associated.

properties.label: is part of
properties.description: Relates an entity to a larger entity of which it is a component.

properties.label: disconnected
properties.description: Relates two spatial regions that are disconnected and share no common point.

properties.label: situation time
properties.description: Relates a situation to the temporal entity that represents when it occurs.

properties.label: requires action
properties.description: Relates a situation to an action that should be performed in response to it.

properties.label: interval during
properties.description: Relates an interval that starts after another interval begins and ends before it ends.

properties.label: interval finishes
properties.description: Relates an interval that ends at the same time as another interval but starts later.

properties.label: associated constraint
properties.description: Relates a process, resource, or situation to a constraint that defines acceptable operational conditions.

properties.label: interval starts
properties.description: Relates an interval that starts at the same time as another interval but ends sooner.

properties.label: interval in
properties.description: Relates an interval that is contained within another interval, without requiring both boundaries to coincide.

properties.label: concerned by
properties.description: Relates a situation or event to an entity, such as a machine, process, or product, that it concerns.

properties.label: has cause
properties.description: Relates a situation to the cause responsible for triggering or explaining it.

properties.label: asWKT
properties.description: Links a geometry to its WKT serialization.

properties.label: observed property
properties.description: Relates an observation to the property that it observes.

properties.label: inXSDDateTimeStamp
properties.description: Position of an instant in which the time-zone field is mandatory.

properties.label: located in
properties.description: Relates a sensor to the spatial object in which it is located.

properties.label: partially overlapping
properties.description: Relates two spatial regions whose interiors overlap, while neither region contains the other.

properties.label: interval started by
properties.description: Relates an interval that starts at the same time as another interval but ends later.

properties.label: asGML
properties.description: Links a geometry to its GML serialization.

properties.label: has feature of interest
properties.description: Relates an observation to the entity whose property is being observed.

properties.label: interval finished by
properties.description: Relates an interval that ends at the same time as another interval but starts earlier.

properties.label: hosts
properties.description: Relates a platform to a sensor, actuator, sampler, or platform that it hosts.

properties.label: non-tangential proper part
properties.description: Relates a spatial region that is completely inside another region without touching its boundary.

properties.label: interval met by
properties.description: Relates an interval that begins exactly when another interval ends.

properties.label: has duration
properties.description: Relates an event, process, or situation to the temporal interval during which it occurs.

properties.label: externally connected
properties.description: Relates two spatial regions that touch along their boundary but whose interiors do not overlap.

properties.label: hasDescription
properties.description: Links a constraint to its description.

properties.label: equals
properties.description: Relates two spatial regions that have exactly the same spatial extent.

properties.label: has property
properties.description: Relates an entity to one of its properties.

properties.label: has observable property
properties.description: Relates an entity in the manufacturing system to a property that can be observed by sensors.

properties.label: is defined for
properties.description: Relates an entity or context element to the situation or property for which it is defined.

properties.label: before
properties.description: Relates a temporal entity that occurs before another temporal entity.

properties.label: inside
properties.description: Relates a temporal instant or interval that occurs within another interval.

properties.label: non-tangential proper part inverse
properties.description: Relates a spatial region that completely contains another region whose boundary it does not touch.

properties.label: has result
properties.description: Relates an observation to the result that it produced.

properties.label: interval after
properties.description: Relates a time interval that occurs completely after another interval.

properties.label: hasSimpleResult
properties.description: Links an obervation to its result, which contains a value representing the value associated with the observed Property.

properties.label: tangential proper part
properties.description: Relates a spatial region that is inside another region and touches its boundary.

properties.label: has geometry
properties.description: Relates a feature to the geometry that represents its spatial extent.

properties.label: after
properties.description: Relates a temporal entity that occurs after another temporal entity.

properties.label: has end
properties.description: Relates a temporal interval to the instant that marks its end.

properties.label: is in location
properties.description: Relates a resource to the spatial object in which it is located.

properties.label: operates
properties.description: Relates a staff member or operator to the machine or workstation that they operate.

properties.label: interval disjoint
properties.description: Relates two temporal intervals that do not overlap in time.

properties.label: interval equals
properties.description: Relates two time intervals that have exactly the same temporal extent.

properties.label: interval meets
properties.description: Relates an interval that ends exactly when another interval begins.
